meaning: n.缺乏,短缺的东西vt.缺乏,没有,需要vi.缺乏,没有
examples: Her eyes ached from lack of sleep.
They were exhausted from lack of sleep.
But, aside from the lack of pools, swimming in Britain is in good condition.
All week Democrats hammered Mrs Palin for her lack of experience of national or international politics.
